questionHtml: Using information from Table 1, calculate the change in the surplus on Vietnam’s balance of trade in goods with Japan between 2015 and 2019.
markschemeHtml:
2015: (15 141 − 12 531)             2610
2019: (22 475 − 16 484)             5991

any valid working should be rewarded with [1]

(Change in surplus) (US)$ 3381 million

An answer of 3 381, without workings or without units, is sufficient for [1].

Own figure rule applies.

meta.title: Using information from Table 1, calculate the change in the surplus on Vietnam’s balance of trade in goods with Japan between 2015 and 2019.
